scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/client.test.js dist/test/hostname.test.js dist/test/index.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && c8 --reporter=lcov --reports-dir=coverage --include='dist/src/**' node --test dist/test/client.test.js dist/test/hostname.test.js dist/test/index.test.js
